## 💡 Idea / Feature
Describe what you want to add

## 🎯 Goal
Why it’s needed and how it will improve the program

## 🔧 Implementation
If you have an idea how to implement it (class, module, GUI element)

## 📎 Additional Information
Screenshots, links to similar implementations
